DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF VLADISLAV CHERNOGUZ MOTION TO COMPEL ZBRZEZNY PRODUCTION FOR INSPECTION AND COPYING PER DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION SERVED IN CONNECTION WITH THE DEPOSITION NOTICE IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT HAS WAIVED ALL OBJECTIONS AS THERE WAS NO TIMELY OBJECTION TO THE DOCUMENT REQUESTSDEFENDANT TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS IN RESPONSE TO DEPOSITION DOCUMENT REQUESTS #1-4, 13-17, 26-29, 38-41, 43, 53-57 AND 66 NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 1, 2019. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED; JUDGE: KATHARINE GALLO; CLERK: JOHNNY SENGMANY (JPT/302).
